items.headline: Sugano, Halvorsen placed on IL; Sullivan, Romano recalled

news_items.headline: 'It was personal': Irked Schlittler bounces back
news_items.summary: Bouncing back from a disappointing loss to the Detroit Tigers, Cam Schlittler pitched eight innings for the second time this year as the New York Yankees defeated the Tampa Bay Rays 5-1 on Monday in the series opener.

news_items.headline: Kepler hits first home run since 80-game ban ended...
news_items.summary: Veteran outfielder Max Kepler, 33, homered to lead the Arizona Diamondbacks to an 8-0 victory over the San Diego Padres on Monday night, his first home run since returning from an 80-game suspension for testing positive for a performance-enhancing drug.

news_items.headline: Sanchez allows career-worst 9 ER in Phils' loss
news_items.summary: Philadelphia ace Cristopher Sanchez allowed a career-worst nine earned runs in just 3 1/3 innings in the Phillies' surprising 15-1 loss to Kansas City on Monday afternoon, telling reporters that the Royals "made me pay, and you just have to keep going."

news_items.headline: Braves' Martín Pérez on injury list, DFA Carrasco
news_items.summary: The Braves placed left-hander Martín Pérez on the 15-day injured list on Monday with a left forearm contusion.

news_items.headline: Dodgers' Phillips back from Tommy John surgery
news_items.summary: Reliever Evan Phillips was reinstated off the injured list Monday, returning to the Los Angeles Dodgers 13 months after having Tommy John surgery.

news_items.headline: Sources: Draft prospect Bumila has UCL injury
news_items.summary: Fireballing Massachusetts prep left-hander Brody Bumila shared an MRI with MLB teams on Monday that revealed damage to the ulnar collateral ligament in his left elbow, sources told ESPN.

news_items.headline: ⚾ Awards Watch: MVP, Cy Young and more

news_items.headline: Dalton Rushing and Dodgers win pivotal challenge, then beat Rockies on walk-off in 11th
news_items.summary: Dalton Rushing caps his three-hit performance against the Colorado Rockies with a walk-off single in the 11th inning of the Dodgers' 8-7 win.

news_items.headline: Not Rushing to a win, Dodgers walk it off in extras
news_items.summary: For the first time this season, the Dodgers played an extra-innings game and they walked it off thanks to Dalton Rushing

news_items.headline: Comeback win helps Brewers reach elusive franchise milestone
D-backs enjoy Walker Buehler’s Off-Day
news_items.summary: Record: 45-45. Pace: 81-81. Change on 2025: +1. The Diamondbacks jumped on Padres starter Walker Buehler early. They scored six runs in the first three innings, and despite this being a Brandon Pfaadt start, were just able to hold on for victory. The win put Arizona back in sole possession of second place in the […]

news_items.headline: MLB Injury Report: Connelly Early shelved with elbow inflammation, hip injury lingers for Byron Buxton
news_items.summary: Jorge Montanez breaks down all of the relevant injury news around the league over the last week.

news_items.headline: Well, We Scored (And Still Lost)
news_items.summary: Jays 1 Giants 10 I don’t know…. At least in the past we were able to make the easy defensive plays. But tonight, we couldn’t even do that. Andrés Giménez made an error. Kazuma Okamoto made an official, had another that should have been an error and made a lousy play on a throw into […]
